nodes.name: Daily 6AM UTC
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 6:00 AM UTC to check data quality

parameters.query:
-- Data quality metrics for the last 24 hours
WITH price_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as total_prices,
    COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) as unique_symbols,
    MAX("timestamp") as latest_price_ts,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX("timestamp"))) / 3600 as hours_since_last_price
  FROM asset_prices
  WHERE "timestamp" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
),
news_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as total_news,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ai_sentiment_score IS NULL) as null_sentiment_count,
    ROUND(
      100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ai_sentiment_score IS NULL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0),
      2
    ) as null_sentiment_pct,
    MAX("timestamp") as latest_news_ts,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX("timestamp"))) / 3600 as hours_since_last_news
  FROM market_news
  WHERE "timestamp" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
)
SELECT 
  ps.total_prices,
  ps.unique_symbols,
  ps.hours_since_last_price,
  ns.total_news,
  ns.null_sentiment_count,
  ns.null_sentiment_pct,
  ns.hours_since_last_news
FROM price_stats ps, news_stats ns;

nodes.name: Query Data Stats
nodes.notes: Queries data quality metrics from PostgreSQL

nodes.name: Has Issues?
nodes.notes: Routes based on whether issues were found

nodes.name: Slack Configured?
nodes.notes: Checks if Slack is configured for alerts

nodes.name: Log Issues
nodes.notes: Logs issues when no Slack configured

nodes.name: Log Success
nodes.notes: Logs successful check when no issues found
